itinerary.mapNote: Through giraffe and buffalo country in Arusha NP. Forest to heath zone. 2514m.
Moorland zone. Colobus monkeys. First views of the ash cone crater. 3570m.
Pre-dawn start. Dramatic knife-edge ridge to Socialist Peak summit. 4566m.
Full descent through all vegetation zones. Wildlife on way out. 1524m.

waypoints.name: Socialist Peak
waypoints.note: Meru summit. Named by Julius Nyerere. Views of Kilimanjaro at sunrise.

waypoints.name: Ash Cone
waypoints.note: 1910 eruption cone inside the main crater. Eerie volcanic landscape.

waypoints.name: Momella Lakes
waypoints.note: Alkaline lakes with flamingos. Hippos at dawn.

waypoints.name: Little Meru
waypoints.note: Secondary summit. Used as acclimatisation point before main ascent.
